notes: Shopify Dawn theme demo store. Clean Liquid-rendered HTML with Web Components (custom elements). Product cards with quick-add buttons. Cart drawer as slide-over panel. Search with predictive results. Medium complexity from custom elements and cart AJAX updates.

endpoints.label: Product Search
endpoints.description: Predictive search with autocomplete dropdown showing products, collections, and pages

endpoints.label: Add to Cart Buttons
endpoints.description: Product card quick-add buttons and product page add-to-cart form with quantity selector

endpoints.label: Main Navigation
endpoints.description: Header menu with links to Catalog, Contact, and collection pages

endpoints.label: Footer Navigation
endpoints.description: Footer links: Quick links, Info, Policies, Social media icons
